AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Introducing the File Search Tool in Gemini API

AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Moonshot AI has unveiled Kimi K2 Thinking, a powerful new model capable of autonomously executing 200-300 sequential tool calls without human intervention. This release marks a significant advancement in the development of highly independent and capable AI agents.
